prompt: Create a futuristic Japanese promotional hero graphic for an AI creative service, designed like a high-impact social media ad or presentation slide. Use a dark black-and-deep-blue cyber background with glowing circuit patterns, star-like particles, and neon light trails forming circular rings around a central editing screen. The composition is a single wide landscape layout with 6 distinct visual panels plus 1 human presenter on the right. At the top center, place a huge bold Japanese headline in distressed metallic gold and white text reading "鍵は画像" on the first line and "一瞬で伝わる" below it, with dramatic 3D depth, rough texture, and strong glow. In the center, place the largest panel: a luminous blue-framed desktop editing interface showing a vivid futuristic cityscape at sunrise, viewed from above with a river, greenery, sleek skyscrapers, warm orange sunlight, and a right-side vertical toolbar including sliders and a color wheel. Surround this centerpiece with 5 smaller glowing panels connected by curved gold arrows pointing outward from the center. Top left panel: a thumbnail example with a futuristic city image and Japanese text reading "未来を、いま創る。", smaller subtext "AI × Innovation" and "時代のソリューション", and a bright cyan label below the panel reading "サムネイル". Top right panel: a banner example with an abstract blue digital globe or network image and Japanese text reading "AIで、未来をデザインする。" with smaller subtext "テクノロジーで、社会にインパクトを。", and a cyan label below reading "バナー". Bottom left panel: a slide/document example with a business infographic style, title text "AIでビジネスを加速", three circular icon areas, an upward graph on the right, and a cyan label below reading "資料・スライド". Bottom center panel: an SNS post example showing a person standing on a mountain peak at sunrise with bold Japanese text "挑戦が、未来を変える。", small social media engagement icons and counts along the bottom bar, and a cyan label below reading "SNS画像". Bottom right panel: a flyer example with a dark blue event poster layout, title text "AI活用セミナー", smaller line "ビジネスの可能性を広げる", large date "6.15", time "10:00–17:00", a yellow circular badge reading "参加費無料", and a cyan label below reading "チラシ・パンフレット". On the right side of the overall composition, place a young woman presenter from waist up, facing forward, lightly smiling, raising her right index finger near her face as if making a key point. She has long straight split-dyed hair, pastel pink on one side and pastel blue on the other, fair skin, and wears a white T-shirt with black text reading "OKIHIRO AI Creative" and a high-waisted soft pink skirt. Her face is intentionally simplified or obscured in a clean ad-like way. At the very bottom, add an enormous gold Japanese slogan inside a black-and-gold framed banner reading "非エンジニアに刺さる". Use intense contrast, neon cyan edge lighting, gold accent typography, glossy UI frames, energetic motion arrows, and a polished tech-marketing aesthetic that feels optimized for convincing non-technical business users about AI-powered image generation.
